#Yining's_assignment_review

##*Good job! I like that you organised your repository into subfolders.*

Potential changes:

- Arrange the chromosomes numerically instead of as text, so that 10 does not come before 2, etc.

- Your output files are not separated by tabs. They have only one column. To fix that, add`sep="\t`at that section where you are saving the files into the "Output_files" folder.
